title: Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus
creator: Mary Wollstonecraft Shelley
license: Public domain (text: Project Gutenberg #84 / audio: LibriVox)
description: Gothic novel of creation and abandonment. Walton's framing letters bracket Victor Frankenstein's confession; the Creature's own long testimony forms the moral core. Rich speaking cast — perfect for showcasing per-character art.
